steps.title: Compare the equations
steps.content:
The left side of the first equation is twice the left side of the second equation.
$$-16x+20y=2(-8x+10y)$$

steps.title: Check the constants
steps.content: If the equations represented the same line, the constant $-24$ would also double to $-48$. Instead, the first equation has constant $48$. The lines are parallel and never intersect. The answer is D.
